CONTACT For security reasons, visits to the constituency office are by appointment only. You can write to me at the address below or contact me by email Address Unit 15F, Ponderosa Business Park, Smithies Ln, Heckmondwike, WF16 0PR United Kingdom Email kim.leadbeater.mp@parliament.uk Tel 01924 975758 Subscribe to Kim's monthly newsletter First name Last name Email * Join I want to subscribe to your mailing list. Promoted by Colin Berry on behalf of Kim Leadbeater MBE at Tom Myer's House, 9 Cross Crown Street, Cleckheaton, BD19 3HW bottom of page
